Powerful Features

Everything You Need to Trade Smarter

Built by traders, for traders. Features that actually matter for NSE & BSE markets.

🤖

AI-Powered Signals

Advanced ML models analyze price action, RSI, MACD & volume to generate high-confidence BUY/SELL signals for NSE & BSE stocks.

⚡

Real-Time Alerts

Instant Telegram notifications the moment a signal is generated. Never miss a trading opportunity in NSE or BSE.

📊

3 Proven Strategies

Momentum, Breakout & Mean Reversion strategies working together. Choose your risk level or let AI pick the best.

🎯

Entry, Target & Stop Loss

Every signal comes with exact entry price, target price and stop loss. Risk management built-in, no guesswork.

📱

Mobile Dashboard

Track your signals, portfolio and performance on any device. Fully responsive design works on phone, tablet & desktop.

🔐

Secure & Reliable

Enterprise-grade security with JWT authentication. 99.9% uptime guaranteed. Your data stays private and protected.

Simple Process

Up and Running in 5 Minutes

📋
01

Sign Up & Choose Plan

Register in 30 seconds. Pick the plan that fits your trading style — from Basic to Enterprise.

🔗
02

Connect Your Broker

Link your Zerodha, Samco or ICICI Direct account (coming soon). Or use our paper trading mode.

📈
03

Receive Live Signals

AI generates BUY/SELL signals every minute with entry price, target and stop loss. Telegram alert sent instantly.

💰
04

Execute & Track

Execute trades on your broker app. Track performance on your personal dashboard with P&L analytics.

Pricing

Start Trading Today

No hidden fees. Cancel anytime. All plans include a 7-day free trial.

For new traders

✅ 30 signals/month
